title: pelargonium × glabrescens
intro: Pelargonium × glabrescens, also known as Mountain Rose Geranium, is a hybrid plant species within the geranium family (Pelargonium). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Pelargonium × glabrescens include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce stress and anxiety, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. The herbal preparations of this plant typically involve infusions, tinctures, or essential oils, which can be used to create teas, salves, or other topical applications.
